name: DoubleVerify
description: Media measurement and verification platform with Rockerbox multi-touch attribution for mobile and cross-channel.

seo.title: DoubleVerify — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: DoubleVerify: Media measurement and verification platform with Rockerbox multi-touch attribution for mobile and cross-channel.

when_to_use: Multi-touch attribution with media quality verification for cross-channel campaigns
Rockerbox attribution integration for mobile and web ad performance reporting
Brand safety and viewability measurement for mobile programmatic campaigns
Ad fraud and invalid traffic filtering across display, video, and CTV

pros: Enterprise-grade viewability, brand safety and IVT
Wide integration across major DSPs and SSPs
Publicly traded with mature compliance posture
cons: Pricing and contracts aimed at large advertisers
MTA layer newer than core verification product
Setup is heavy for small teams
review.verdict: Heavy-duty verification plus MTA for big brands, but overkill and overpriced for scrappy mobile teams.
review.best_for: Large brand advertisers needing verification, brand safety and cross-channel MTA in one vendor.
review.not_for: Indie mobile app developers or small DTC brands on tight budgets.
